name: testResetAllTheFilters
description: Verify Reset filter cleans all the filters applied
descriptionHtml: Verify Reset filter cleans all the filters applied

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify Reset filter cleans all the filters applied

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select 'Schuster, Skiles and Bayer' company using filter
Fill in merchant name: Medical Practice
Select 'Schuster, Skiles and Bayer' company using filter
Select 'Medical Practice' business unit using filter
Verify that all the values are presented in filter's filter
Verify that all the filter are cleaned
